ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent's name or team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (league, tournament, friendly) */,
  "game_format" TEXT /* Format of game (singles, doubles, team) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the player */,
  "average" REAL /* Player's average score */,
  "average_points_scored_per_game" REAL /* Player's average points scored per game */,
  "average_points_conceded_per_game" REAL /* Player's average points conceded per game */,
  "average_game_duration" REAL /* Player's average game duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the leaderboard */,
  "ranking_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for ranking players in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Profile picture URL of the player
Profile picture URL of the coach
ID of the player who played the game
ID of the player the statistic belongs to
Total points scored by the player
Total points scored against the player
Player's average points scored per game
Player's average points conceded per game
Criteria for ranking players in the leaderboard
